Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 90 -1 68 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Good morning. This is Elizabeth.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 90 -1 68 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}There is something I wish to discuss with you, so please come to the Velvet Room posthaste.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 90 -1 68 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}I believe this matter is of great import to you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 90 -1 68 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}I shall be anticipating your arrival.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Elizabeth wants to tell me something.[n]What could be so important?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should go to the Velvet[n]Room after school...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 90 -1 68 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Good morning. This is Elizabeth.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 90 -1 68 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}I am calling to inform you that more humans have wandered into Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 90 -1 68 0 0}{f 2 4 1} this time, I believe. Please swiftly and safely conduct a search and rescue.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 90 -1 68 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}One this time, I believe. Please swiftly and safely conduct a search and rescue.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_2_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 90 -1 68 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Two this time, I believe. Please swiftly and safely conduct a search and rescue.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 90 -1 68 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Three this time, I believe. Please swiftly and safely conduct a search and rescue.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_4_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 90 -1 68 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Four this time, I believe. Please swiftly and safely conduct a search and rescue.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 90 -1 68 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Five this time, I believe. Please swiftly and safely conduct a search and rescue.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 90 -1 68 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Good morning. This is Elizabeth.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 90 -1 68 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}I am calling to inform you that more humans have wandered into Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 90 -1 68 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}One this time, I believe. Please swiftly and safely conduct a search and rescue.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 90 -1 68 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}This time in particular, I believe this human is an {f 0 1 2}acquaintance of yours{f 0 1 27}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems that someone[n]I know is lost in Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}If I don't save them, the consequences[n]could be {f 0 1 2}irreversible{f 0 1 27}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 90 -1 68 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Good morning. This is Elizabeth.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 90 -1 68 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}I am calling to inform you that more humans have wandered into Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 90 -1 68 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}{f 2 4 1} this time, I believe, and there seems to be {f 0 1 2}an acquaintance of yours{f 0 1 27} among them.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 90 -1 68 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}I suggest you carry out a rescue posthaste.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems that someone[n]I know is lost in Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}If I don't save them, the consequences[n]could be {f 0 1 2}irreversible{f 0 1 27}...[n]{f 1 1}
